title: golenkinianthe gilanica
intro: Golenkinianthe gilanica is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Iran. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Golenkinianthe gilanica include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Golenkinianthe gilanica often involve the use of its leaves and roots, which can be dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures.
